title: Planetary 16x
description: A pvp texture pack sticking to vanilla type textures but with more colorful colors.
body:
A pvp texture pack sticking to vanilla type textures but with more colorful colors.


This pack textures

- **Tools**
- **Armor**
- **Ores**
- **Golden Apple**
- **Totems**
- **Attack Particles**


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/it1JCZq5zcU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



Best used with 
- **Smaller Totems/Utilities**
- **Lower Shields**
- **Lower Fire**
